[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100111101 6
2 101001101 5
3 101100010 4
4 001010101 4
5 001111101 6
6 011011100 5
7 011101110 6
